hypothesis: After promoting MAX_POSITION_PCT to 40%, positions already down-weighted by existing risk multipliers may deserve a lower initial concentration cap than full-risk entries.
change_summary: Ran an experiment-only replay that capped non-zero reduced-risk signals at 20%, 25%, and 30% while leaving entries, exits, risk multipliers, add-ons, gap cancels, scarce-slot routing, LLM/news replay, and earnings unchanged.

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but lags indexes
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected because no tested reduced-risk cap ever bound a position, so the replay was a strict null.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft ranking remains sample-limited, so this deterministic allocation alpha was tested instead.

rejection_reason: Reduced-risk cap tightening is not a live allocation lever under the current stack because non-zero reduced-risk positions are already too small to hit even a 20% cap.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby reduced-risk cap values without new concentration evidence.
A valid retry needs a more specific quality bucket than all non-zero reduced-risk signals.
Do not use this to reopen global MAX_POSITION_PCT or ADDON_MAX_POSITION_PCT sweeps.
notes: Alpha search, not bug repair. Production strategy code was unchanged because Gate 4 failed.
